description: Use this API to return the magnitude of a specified fixed bus shunt. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, rval = fxsdt1(ibus, id ,string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the units to be used. (input).

return_values.name: rval
return_values.description: Magnitude of the complex shunt in the units indicated by string. (output).

string.description: Actual shunt. ‘RVAL’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Nominal shunt (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘RVAL’ returned in MVA.
Nominal shunt (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘RVAL’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Nominal zero sequence shunt (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘RVAL’ returned in per unit.
Nominal zero sequence shunt (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘RVAL’ returned in MVA.
Nominal zero sequence shunt (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘RVAL’ returned in units determined by the power output option setting.

error_codes.description: Bus type code is not 1, 2 or 3; ‘RVAL’ returned.
Sequence data not in case for ‘STRING1’ = ‘PQZERO’, ‘PQZ’ or ‘O_PQZ’; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
